arts.ttl: Wigan Athletic: The 12th Man - From Socrates quotes to free pies...another regulation week at Latics
arts.sum: Our panel of Latics experts assess a disastrous home defeat to rock-bottom Burton Albion, ahead of Saturday’s ‘Bring a Friend For Free’ clash against Bristol Rovers...with the possibility of distinct a free pie for those quick enough...

arts.ttl: 'Seeking solutions' and 'putting things right' - Wigan Athletic new-boy's quest
arts.sum: Ollie Norburn has called on Wigan Athletic to 'find solutions to when teams are sitting in' at the Brick Community Stadium.

arts.ttl: I need last season's 'siege mentality' back, says Wigan Athletic boss
arts.sum: Shaun Maloney says he's desperate to rekindle the siege mentality that underpinned last season for Wigan Athletic.

arts.ttl: Wigan Athletic 'a massive club', admits Bristol Rovers chief
arts.sum: Inigo Calderon is readying his Bristol Rovers team for this weekend's trip to a 'massive club' in Wigan Athletic.
